build_system: None - static files served by Netlify
verification_instructions: Open index.html in a browser or verify JS syntax with node --check keuangan-app.js
setup_instructions: No setup required - vanilla JS static app
environment_constraints: No build tools, no package manager. Verify syntax only with node --check.
key_patterns: Functions use 'function' keyword (not arrow functions for compatibility). KDB.getAll('collection') and KDB.save('collection', id, data) for data access. STATUS constants for approval states. genId('prefix') for IDs. today() returns YYYY-MM-DD string. fmtRp() for currency formatting. fmtDate() for date formatting. showAlert() for user messages. showLoading() for loading indicator. navigate() for page routing. getAkunKasBank() and getApprovers() async helpers.
relevant_files: keuangan-app.js (lines 3006-3020 - renderForecastBayar/Terima, lines 1997-2082 - integrasiPermohonanDanaMasukKeJurnal, lines 355-370 - app init after login)
directory_structure: Root: index.html (single page), keuangan-app.js (all app logic ~12478 lines), keuangan-firebase.js (Firebase/KDB), netlify/ (serverless functions), netlify.toml (config)
